prompt: Chcem vidiet analyzu zmluv za Q4 2025 - posledny kvartal minuleho roka. Co sa tam deje?

assertions.name: correct_q4_dates
assertions.check: The SQL queries use date_from=2025-10-01 and date_to=2026-01-01

assertions.name: follows_output_template
assertions.check: Output follows the structured template: Sumar, then numbered category sections, then Zhrnutie najdov

assertions.name: interpretations_present
assertions.check: Each query result section includes a brief interpretation
